review.nextAction: Review the MP4 and contact sheet, then record approve, needs_revision, or reject.

caption: Smooth base for cleaner salon work. Shop Crystal Clawz French Rubber Base.
visualReviewSummary: The video is vertical and branded with Crystal Clawz text. Product bottle imagery is visible across the reviewed frames. The draft uses static product-card scenes, not real creator/UGC footage. On-frame text is readable in the contact sheet but still fairly text-heavy for Reels or TikTok. The draft is suitable for workflow proof and manual review. It should not be treated as final approved creative yet.
